title: 1.2 Pure and Applied Fields of Biology
description: Comprehensive coverage of the distinction between pure and applied biology, examples of each, and important interdisciplinary fields such as biotechnology, bioinformatics, genetic engineering, biomedical engineering, environment management, and forensic science.

questions.question: What is pure biology?
options: The use of biological knowledge to manage life
The study of how life functions in nature
The application of biology in industry
questions.correctAnswer: The study of how life functions in nature

questions.question: Which of the following topics is studied under pure biology?
options: Behavior, internal and external structure, and reproduction
questions.correctAnswer: Behavior, internal and external structure, and reproduction

questions.question: What is applied biology?
options: The study of how life functions in nature
The study of theoretical biological principles
Using what you have learned in biology for practical purposes
The study of only plant life
questions.correctAnswer: Using what you have learned in biology for practical purposes

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of applied biology?
options: Agriculture, nursery work, plant disease, forestry, and poultry
questions.correctAnswer: Agriculture, nursery work, plant disease, forestry, and poultry

What is biotechnology?
options: The study of computer programs for biological data
The use of living organisms or their products for the welfare of humanity
The application of engineering to medicine
questions.correctAnswer: The use of living organisms or their products for the welfare of humanity

questions.question: What does biotechnology involve the technical manipulation of?
What has been produced by biotechnology according to the text?
options: Genetically modified and improved varieties of crops and animals
questions.correctAnswer: Genetically modified and improved varieties of crops and animals

questions.question: What is bioinformatics concerned with?
options: The use of living organisms for industrial production
The acquisition, storage, analysis, and dissemination of biological data
The application of engineering to medicine
questions.correctAnswer: The acquisition, storage, analysis, and dissemination of biological data

questions.question: Bioinformatics most often deals with which type of biological data?
Bioinformatics uses computer programs for which of the following applications?
options: Determining gene and protein functions, establishing evolutionary relationships, and predicting three-dimensional shapes of proteins
questions.correctAnswer: Determining gene and protein functions, establishing evolutionary relationships, and predicting three-dimensional shapes of proteins

questions.question: What is genetic engineering?
options: The study of genes and heredity
Extracting selected genes from an organism or synthesizing selected genes and inserting them into another organism
The use of computer programs to analyze genetic data
The study of genetic variation in populations
questions.correctAnswer: Extracting selected genes from an organism or synthesizing selected genes and inserting them into another organism

questions.question: What is the result of genetic engineering?
options: The organism develops a new combination of genes
questions.correctAnswer: The organism develops a new combination of genes

questions.question: What is biomedical engineering?
options: The use of living organisms for medical purposes
The application of the principles and problem-solving techniques of engineering to biology and medicine
The study of biological data using computers
questions.correctAnswer: The application of the principles and problem-solving techniques of engineering to biology and medicine

questions.question: What does biomedical engineering focus on?
options: Advances that improve human health and health care at all levels
The development of new computer programs
questions.correctAnswer: Advances that improve human health and health care at all levels

questions.question: What does environment management deal with?
options: The study of microorganisms in the environment
Environmental observation and finding solutions to maintain the balance of nature
questions.correctAnswer: Environmental observation and finding solutions to maintain the balance of nature

questions.question: What is forensic science?
options: The application of engineering to medicine
The application of the knowledge of biological science to criminal and civil laws
questions.correctAnswer: The application of the knowledge of biological science to criminal and civil laws

questions.question: Which biological science techniques are used in forensic science according to the text?
